title: Registry Manipulation Monitor
summary: A light registry montioring tool on Windows that's built with GoLang to detect and triage every registry edit
outcomes: A dashboard that will show alerts and registry changes with risk-based categorization
Made registry changes by attackers detectable in real-time

sections.title: Mission
body: This concept was designed around a simple problem: There are no light registry monitoring tools that will detect and send alerts about registry edits.

sections.title: Approach
body: The build was done by levels, first level was done by making a simple registry monitor that will watch one key in Windows Registry, the next level was done by implementing a global registry monitor

sections.title: Value
body: The result is a repeatable format for understanding what changed, what matters, and what needs a second pass before taking actions.

title: Operator Reporting Kit
summary: A reporting structure for turning raw findings into concise, remediation-ready narratives for both technical and non-technical readers.
outcomes: Separated technical evidence from executive context cleanly
Cut time spent rewriting recurring sections

sections.title: Mission
body: Reporting is where good technical work often loses impact. This kit focuses on making exploitation evidence, business impact, and remediation guidance easier to consume.

sections.title: Approach
body: The structure uses reusable finding blocks, severity context, and proof-focused layouts so reports stay readable without losing depth.

sections.title: Value
body: The output helps security teams move faster on fixes while still giving leadership enough clarity to prioritize the work.

title: AD Lab Attack Paths
summary: A lab-driven Active Directory workflow for mapping privilege escalation chains, weak delegation, and lateral movement opportunities.
outcomes: Documented defender-visible signals during each phase
Created better validation checklists for internal assessments

sections.title: Mission
body: This project exists as a repeatable training ground for understanding how small identity misconfigurations chain into serious domain risk.

sections.title: Approach
body: Each path is documented from initial enumeration to escalation, including the assumptions required for the path to succeed and the artifacts it leaves behind.

sections.title: Value
body: The result is a better link between offensive execution and defender visibility, which improves both testing quality and remediation advice.
